standardLibrary.signature: map<F, A, B> arg1: (A -> B) -> arg2: F<A> -> F<B> where Functor<F>
standardLibrary.description: Transforms the value inside a Functor without changing its shape.

standardLibrary.name: pure
standardLibrary.signature: pure<F, A> arg1: A -> F<A> where Applicative<F>
standardLibrary.description: Lifts a value into an Applicative context.
